FEIYAP_KEYWORD_IAIDO.title: Iaido
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_IAIDO.description: When attacked, consume [gold]Iaido[/gold] equal to the damage to negate it and counter for the same amount as attack damage. Remove all [gold]Iaido[/gold] at turn start. When you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], reduce [gold]Iaido[/gold] by 2. [gold]Dexterity[/gold] amplifies [gold]Iaido[/gold] gained.
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_CONSTELLATION.title: Constellation
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_ZANXIN.title: Zanxin
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_ZANXIN.description: Your next played card gains 1 additional [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Iaido[/gold].
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_TAROT_UPRIGHT.title: Tarot - Upright
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_TAROT_UPRIGHT.description: The last card played was a [gold]Skill[/gold].
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_TAROT_REVERSED.title: Tarot - Reversed
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_TAROT_REVERSED.descriptio: The last card played was an [gold]Attack[/gold].
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_PERFECT_IAIDO.title: Perfect Iaido
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_PERFECT_IAIDO.description: When you trigger [gold]Iaido[/gold], if your [gold]Iaido[/gold] equals the incoming attack damage, it counts as [gold]Perfect Iaido[/gold].
